profile: Software Engineering Manager with over ten years in mobile, specialising in React Native at scale. Most recently owned the mobile platform behind Hargreaves Lansdown's new app, and led two squads through Sky's SAFe release train. I pair hands-on technical direction with the people side of leadership: hiring, coaching, and growing engineers into confident, independent contributors.

experience.summary: Led the Mobile Platform squad building HL's new React Native app from scratch, replacing the native iOS and Android apps and owning the platform every mobile team shipped through. A brownfield migration to React Native + GraphQL for a business managing £150bn+ across a million+ active users, covering Product Manager and Principal Engineer responsibilities alongside the EM role.
bullets: Delivered a high-profile, time-critical IPO launch ahead of a deadline brought forward twice, shipping a virtual waiting room across iOS and Android to hold a projected **500k+ concurrent applicants**.

Hired **3 engineers** into the platform team and helped staff a sister squad, running six interviews toward a further hire, then ran the platform handover from an outgoing offshore team, leaving the London team releasing independently.

Set the technical direction: proved module federation viable on React Native with two proof-of-concepts, and turned discovery into a **67-epic** backlog with Scrum practice and full platform documentation.
experience.tech: TypeScript · Swift · Kotlin · React Native · Apollo GraphQL · Appium

experience.summary: Led two engineering squads within the SAFe-based Join, Onboard & Engage release train, part of Sky's Cross-Product Sales Experience portfolio, spanning delivery ownership, technical oversight, people management and cross-functional collaboration.
bullets: Managed **10+ engineers** (permanent, contract and early-career) through regular 1:1s, feedback, mentoring and progression.
Drove PI planning, ART syncs and roadmap alignment, guiding architecture for both React Native and web stacks.
Developed multiple early-career engineers from graduate onboarding through to promotion and independent delivery.

subRole.summary: Built the new eSIM React Native journeys (activation, installation, conversion, reinstall) for eSIM-only devices, and mentored junior and mid-level developers.
subRole.tech: TypeScript · React Native · Apollo GraphQL · Redux Toolkit · WebdriverIO · CircleCI

experienceCompact.summary: Led the team building the Chelsea FC Fifth Stand app: mentored developers, shaped requirements with the client, and ran POCs to validate new features.
experienceCompact.tech: TypeScript · React Native · Redux Toolkit · Detox · CircleCI

experienceCompact.summary: Built the new React Native apps for Babylonstoren and The Newt.
experienceCompact.tech: TypeScript · React Native · Redux Toolkit · Detox · CircleCI

experienceCompact.summary: Led a NodeJS / ReactJS / React Native team for FanDuel, and stood up the Zonal tablet POS to a **4-month MVP** while shaping xDesign's React Native practice.
experienceCompact.tech: TypeScript · React Native · ReactJS · Redux · RxJS · Detox · Bitrise

experienceCompact.summary: Led a transformation squad converting the Priority Pass, Mastercard Airport Experience and LoungeKey apps from native iOS/Android to React Native.
experienceCompact.tech: TypeScript · React Native · Redux Toolkit · Bitrise
